description: Black-and-white (sepia or duotone) studio portrait photograph of President Theodore Roosevelt, with no added on-image text, graphics, or design elements. Roosevelt is shown from roughly the knees up, standing in a three-piece dark suit with a patterned necktie, pince-nez glasses, and a bushy mustache, looking off to the side against a mottled cloudy studio backdrop. The archival photograph accompanies the tweet announcing his induction into the Department of Labor's Labor Hall of Honor. It carries no typography, slogans, or seals.
